title: hydrocotyle hirsuta var. leptostachys
intro: Hydrocotyle hirsuta var. leptostachys, commonly known as the hairy pennywort, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family that is native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of hairy pennywort include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and aid in the treatment of fever, headache, and digestive issues. Hairy pennywort is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
